rationale: Fast Ring C3; ring clock gating fast C3 idle state
scope: Objective: Validate CBB CCF Fast Ring C3, an autonomous low-power state entered when all cores in a DCM module reach MC6 (Module C6). pf: Criteria PASS ** MC6 residency increments; PMA Fast C3 Q-channel assertion observed; Global Uclk tree clock-gated during module idle; VCCRING retained; fast wake on interrupt (<10 cycles); PLR = 0x0;

rationale: Ring C3; ring clock gating C3

prec: Item Requirement Platform booted BIOS CPL4 complete; PCode running BIOS: C-states + PkgCx enabled CC6 and PkgC6 inducible (HSLE) or CC6/MC6 (silicon) HSLE/Simics: MWAIT injection supported Simics magic instruction for `EAX=0x25` (C6S-P) available CBB

tc_title: CBB CCF PCODE algorithm for distress input
tcd_title: CCB CCF PCODE algorithm for distress input
rationale: PCode distress algorithm; PCode response to CCF distress input
scope: Objective: Validate the CBB PCode algorithm that processes distress inputs (SBO back-pressure, CBO occupancy) and converts them into CCF frequency up-decisions. The algorithm uses threshold-based hysteresis: distress above threshold triggers GVFSM frequency boost; below threshold for N slow-loops, b
prec: Item Requirement System booted to XOS/SVOS BIOS CPL4 complete; PCode running TPMI accessible per CBB `sv.socket0.cbbN.base.tpmi.*` readable PythonSV namednodes loaded `import namednodes; sv = namednodes.sv` succeeds Workload available CPU stress or c
pf: Criteria PASS ** Threshold behavior correct; boost fires only above threshold; hysteresis holds boost N slow-loops; no oscillation under rapid load; boost reaches P0; per-CBB independence; PLR = 0x0.
